chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-105 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 20.04.2026 Mr.Ahmed Nawaz Chang, Advocate for the applicant Mr.Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, A.P.G for the State ********* Mr.Nazeer Ahmed Kalhoro, Advocate, files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No. 3, which is taken on record. The detainee Samina (old name: Lali), is present before this Court and is clearly of age of majority. Upon being asked by the learned A.P.G, in Sindhi language, whether she is under any restraint or duress, she has responded in the negative. In these circumstances, this application has served its purpose. The detainee is at liberty to choose her place of dwelling. Meanwhile, the concerned S.H.O. is directed to provide legal protection to the applicant as she leaves for her abode. Given the above, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
